articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

articles.headline: Riley McGree ruled out of World Cup
articles.description: Australia has been dealt a major blow on the eve of the FIFA World Cup after confirming that attacker Riley McGree will miss the tournament through injury.

articles.headline: 2026 World Cup: Which 48 teams qualified for the tournament?
articles.description: The race to qualify for the 2026 FIFA World Cup is complete. Here's how it all went down across the globe.

images.name: Marcotti: Italy have 'no excuses' for another World Cup failure

articles.headline: Meet Tahiti United, the soccer team that plays all of its games tomorrow
articles.description: There's a team of time travelers who must voyage into the future every time they play a match, while their fans back home follow them from yesterday.

articles.headline: Matildas 'winning ugly' at Women's Asian Cup
articles.description: ESPN's The Far Post discuss the Matildas' 2-1 win and how the win wasn't pretty but sometimes that's how you have to get results in tournament football.
